result.reason: This feature would allow users to import session data from MobaXTerm, expanding compatibility and ease of migration for users.
result.approach: Create a MobaXTermSessionsFileProvider to read .moba files and a MobaXTermSessionsDeserializer to parse their content and convert them into mRemoteNG's internal connection format. Integrate this new import option into the application's UI, likely in the import dialog and main form.
